message: I came here because I was curious about
I wonder if they'll really let me inside?
it's been a while, hasn't it!
What are you talking about? You just came by a bit ago.
With that blank look on your face,
Even though it's just the same room as always, it somehow feels like a strange place.
I want to believe it's just my imagination that there's madness in that faintly smiling face.
I wish Guy could have come with me. Hehe.
You’re going to marry Guy soon, right? So, getting ready is tough. I can’t help but feel like I want to scream in excitement.
Oh come on, don’t make that serious face.
Isn't it you who has something going on? Poor thing.
Ah, I can't wait for the wedding!
Guy? He's my beloved. Oh dear, what am I even saying now? Hehe.
I ended up asking a silly question, didn't I?
It's really true. You're the person who knows Guy and me the best.
It's strange for both of us, isn't it?
Today, I'm going with Guy to look at wedding dresses.
Did you have plans for that?
What are you talking about? Isn't it the schedule you and Guy decided on?
I wonder what kind of dress I should wear, huh?
Seems to be quite mentally exhausted. I have to do something soon.
It's as if they've gone mad. No, maybe their heart is already broken.
unclear about what he thinks about it.
